description_long: This object consists of four modern smartphones, each with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front faces feature large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreens with minimal bezels and a small notch at the top for the front camera and sensors. The backs are finished in metallic and glass materials, with prominent triple-lens camera arrays arranged in a square module at the upper left corner. The devices display different color finishes, including black, silver, gold, and blue, and each has a reflective Apple logo centered on the back. The sides are flat with visible metallic bands, and subtle buttons are present along the edges. The screens show a digital clock, date, and a colorful gradient wallpaper, indicating the devices are powered on.
description: A group of four modern smartphones with large glass touchscreens, metallic edges, and triple-lens camera arrays, each in a different color finish. The front displays are active, showing a digital clock and vibrant wallpaper.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profiles and metallic edges of the four smartphones, with no screen or camera details visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the active touchscreens with digital clocks, colorful gradient wallpapers, and the front notches for cameras and sensors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the thinness and metallic bands of the smartphones, similar to view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the metallic and glass backs, centered Apple logos, and prominent triple-lens camera arrays in the upper left corners.
attribute_brand_logo: Each phone has a silver Apple logo centered on the back, highly reflective and distinct against the colored finishes.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screens display a digital clock reading 9:41, the date 'Monday, June 22', and a colorful gradient wallpaper. No app icons or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Each phone has a triple camera array arranged in a square module at the upper left corner on the back, with lenses and a flash visible.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible along the right and left edges, likely including a power button and volume rockers, but no buttons are present on the front or back surfaces.
